original_message: My bathtub is overflowing and water is going onto the bathroom floor.
escalation_path: Route to maintenance supervisor for same-day dispatch review.
recommended_action: Dispatch maintenance immediately to stop overflow and limit water damage. Instruct resident to shut off the water if possible and stop using the fixture.
resident_instructions: Stop using the fixture and shut off water if safe.
resident_reply: Thank you for reporting this. Please stop using the fixture and shut off the water if you can do so safely. We are notifying maintenance now for a prompt response.
internal_notes: Property=NorthStar Gardens; Building=Building A; Unit=2B; Resident=Test Resident 1; Department=Maintenance; Trade=Plumbing; ServiceDeliveryModel=In-House; VendorRecommended=False; RuleOverride=True; MatchedRule=overflowing fixture

original_message: The heat is not working in my apartment and it is very cold in here.
escalation_path: Route to maintenance supervisor for same-day dispatch review.
recommended_action: Dispatch HVAC or maintenance promptly. Confirm indoor conditions and outside temperature. Escalate to emergency if freezing conditions are present.
resident_instructions: Use safe temporary warming measures only and await follow-up from the property team.
resident_reply: Thank you for letting us know. We are treating this as urgent and routing it to maintenance now.
internal_notes: Property=NorthStar Gardens; Building=Building C; Unit=4D; Resident=Test Resident 2; Department=Maintenance; Trade=HVAC; ServiceDeliveryModel=In-House; VendorRecommended=False; RuleOverride=True; MatchedRule=heating outage

original_message: My kitchen faucet has been dripping for three days.
recommended_action: Schedule a plumber to inspect and repair the dripping kitchen faucet.
eta_guidance: A maintenance technician should be able to address this within 3 to 5 business days.
resident_instructions: Please wait for follow-up instructions from the property team.
resident_reply: Thank you for letting us know about your leaking kitchen faucet. We will arrange for a plumber to fix it as soon as possible and will keep you updated on the scheduling.

original_message: I smell something burning from the breaker panel.
escalation_path: Escalate to specialist vendor dispatch and notify maintenance supervisor for technical review.
recommended_action: Treat as an electrical emergency. Dispatch maintenance or electrician immediately. If safe, instruct resident to stay away from the area and call emergency services if smoke or fire is present.
resident_instructions: Stay away from the area and call 911 if smoke or fire appears.
resident_reply: This is being treated as an emergency. Please stay away from the affected electrical area. Call 911 right away if there is smoke or fire. We are escalating this immediately.
internal_notes: Property=NorthStar Gardens; Building=Building D; Unit=3C; Resident=Test Resident 4; Department=Maintenance; Trade=Electrical; ServiceDeliveryModel=Specialist Vendor; VendorRecommended=True; RuleOverride=True; MatchedRule=electrical hazard

original_message: I lost my key fob and cannot get into the building.
escalation_path: Route to leasing or front office workflow.
recommended_action: Verify resident identity and assist with building access and key fob replacement or reprogramming under property policy.
resident_instructions: Wait for identity verification and access instructions.
resident_reply: Thank you. We are routing this as an access issue and will follow up as quickly as possible under property procedures.

original_message: There is sewage backing up into my shower drain.
escalation_path: Escalate immediately to emergency vendor dispatch and notify maintenance supervisor.
recommended_action: Treat as an emergency plumbing sanitation issue. Dispatch maintenance immediately and instruct resident to avoid the affected fixtures and area.
resident_instructions: Avoid the affected area and do not use impacted plumbing fixtures.
resident_reply: This is being treated as an emergency. Please avoid the affected plumbing area. We are notifying maintenance for immediate response.
